title: 2026-07-02 Porto Azulejo River Wind
summary: Porto dry early-July set using azulejo blue across a Sao Bento-style station hall, Bolhao-style market arcade, Serralves-style museum garden, and Foz do Douro waterfront wind.
summaryJa: ポルトのアルバム。色の軸はアズレージョブルー。構成は移動、マーケット、ミュージアム、水辺。

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman in a Sao Bento Station-style Porto rail hall with blue-and-white azulejo tile walls and bright dry July light beyond the platform, checking a paper train ticket while lifting a canvas tote, wearing a white sleeveless rib knit, loose ivory linen camp shirt, azulejo-blue scarf tied to the tote, charcoal cropped wide trousers, flat black leather sandals, and small silver earrings
images.title: 01 Transit Sao Bento ticket
images.locationDetail: Sao Bento Station-style Porto rail hall with azulejo tile walls

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman standing at a Mercado do Bolhao-style Porto market arcade stall, receiving a paper bag of peaches and bread from a vendor just outside frame, with tiled counters, fruit crates, flowers, iron roof structure, and warm stone light around her, wearing a cornflower-blue sleeveless camp blouse, white linen knee-length wrap skirt with subtle tile-blue stitching, woven basket tote, blue wrist scarf, low ivory socks, caramel leather flat sandals, and a bead necklace
images.title: 02 Market Bolhao peaches
images.locationDetail: Mercado do Bolhao-style Porto market arcade

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman in a Serralves Museum and park-style Porto contemporary art garden, comparing a sketchbook and dark blue fabric swatch near pale museum walls, clipped green hedges, outdoor sculpture forms, and a pinkish villa tone in the distance, wearing a sleeveless tailored ivory long vest, deep azulejo-blue asymmetric sash belt, wide sand linen trousers, square-toe navy mules, a thin gold bracelet, and compact structured bag
images.title: 03 Gallery Serralves sash
images.locationDetail: Serralves Museum and park-style Porto contemporary art garden

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman at a Foz do Douro-style Porto waterfront promenade where the river meets the Atlantic, holding down a windblown open white linen shirt by a stone seawall with surf and a distant lighthouse shape behind her, wearing an azulejo-blue ribbed camisole, cream wrap midi skirt with side tie, thin navy belt, woven espadrille sandals, straw-and-leather crossbody bag, and small shell-like earrings
images.title: 04 Resort Foz wind linen
images.locationDetail: Foz do Douro-style Porto waterfront promenade
